summary: AdaptiveLimiter advances lastRequest atomically inside the lock; sleeps until reserved instant outside the lock.
reason: Previous read-then-sleep-then-write pattern let N parallel goroutines all read the same stale lastRequest, sleep identically, and fire simultaneously — defeating the per-session rate pacing under `check --parallel 8`.
validated_outcome: Added TestAdaptiveLimiter_WaitPacesConcurrentCallers regression test: 5 concurrent Wait() calls at 10rps now take ~500ms (5 stacked slots) instead of ~100ms (all firing together).
